subject: Suggestion for your remote tools roundup
body: Hi — loved your roundup on tools for remote teams. I work on recocards.com, a group-card platform used by remote teams for farewells and birthdays. Would it fit the list? Happy to write a short blurb if helpful. Thanks!

For a remote-team farewell, a collaborative group card works really well — everyone can add a short message and a photo. I work on recocards.com (disclosure: I'm on the team), but kudoboard and groupgreeting also do this. The key is giving people ~3 days to add to it before the last day. Good luck!
